Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties James Pierce Sr. (#274013) and Shirley Pierce, et al. (#275588)

RULING:
Plaintiffs James Pierce Sr. (#274013) and Shirley Pierce, et al. (#275588)'s motions for an order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motions are granted. No opposition filed. Case #274013 is designated as the lead case and all future documents to be filed in the lead case. An order granting the consoldation was signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported =(220/HEK)
